pages.text:
**NOTARIAL DEED OF DONATION**

**Document ID: donation_money_006**
**Date of Deed: 3 December 2019**
**Place of Execution: Bruges, Belgium**
**Notary: Meester Annelies De Smet, Bruges**

---

**HEADING**

In the year two thousand and nineteen, on the third day of December, before me, Meester Annelies De Smet, Notary
Public in Bruges, Belgium, duly appointed and sworn, appeared:

1. **Hendrik Janssen**, born on the 15th of March 1948, residing at [insert address], hereinafter referred to as the
"Donor";
2. **Maria Janssen-De Vos**, born on the 22nd of July 1951, residing at [insert address], hereinafter referred to as the
"Donor";
  (Together referred to as the "Donors")

and

3. **Thomas Janssen**, born on the 9th of November 1972, residing at [insert address], hereinafter referred to as the
"Donee".

The Donors and Donee are collectively referred to as the "Parties".

---

**RECITALS**

WHEREAS, the Donors are the parents of the Donee and wish to provide financial support for the renovation and
improvement of the family house located at Kerkstraat 12 in Bruges, Belgium;

WHEREAS, this monetary donation is made as an advance on the Donee's future inheritance, with the intention of
assisting him in housing-related expenses;

WHEREAS, the Donors intend to treat their children equitably in matters relating to inheritance and donations;

NOW, THEREFORE, the Parties agree as follows:

---

**DONATION CLAUSE**

The Donors hereby donate and present to the Donee a monetary gift in the amount of **Fifty Thousand Euros (EUR
50,000)**. This donation shall be transferred by bank transfer to the following account of the Donee:
**[Insert Donee's Bank Account Details]**.

The Donee hereby accepts this donation for the express purpose of using the funds to support the renovation and
improvement of the family house located at Kerkstraat 12 in Bruges, Belgium.

---

**ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT**

The Donee acknowledges receipt of the aforementioned amount of **Fifty Thousand Euros (EUR 50,000)**, which he
confirms will be used solely for the purposes stated herein. The Donee further acknowledges that this donation is made
as an advance on inheritance, and he agrees to account for this donation in any future estate settlement.

---

**FISCAL AND INHERITANCE-RELATED CLAUSES**

The Parties acknowledge that this donation shall be treated in accordance with the applicable Belgian laws regarding
donations and inheritance. The Donors confirm that they have provided this gift with the intent to assist the Donee, while
also ensuring that the value of this donation will be taken into consideration when calculating the total value of the
Donors' estate at the time of their passing.

The Donee acknowledges that this donation does not preclude the Donors from making future donations to other
children or family members. The Donors affirm their intention to treat all their children equitably, and any future
donations will be documented and accounted for as per legal requirements.

---

**SIGNATURES**

In witness whereof, the Parties have executed this deed in the presence of me, the Notary, at Bruges, Belgium, on the
day and year first above written.

**The Donors:**
______________________________
Hendrik Janssen

______________________________
Maria Janssen-De Vos

**The Donee:**
______________________________
Thomas Janssen

**Notary Public:**
______________________________
Meester Annelies De Smet
Notary Public in Bruges, Belgium

---

**[Seal of the Notary]**
**[Notary's Registration Number]**

This document has been drafted in accordance with the relevant provisions of Belgian law and shall serve as an
authenticated record of the monetary donation herein described.
